text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan's second summer camp is coming to
a close.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...I love the sound of the waves.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I'm sure it feels that way because we have
peace of mind ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I didn't feel this way at the end of summer camp
last year.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But this year... I feel so at peace. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...I'm sure that's because you were watching me
this year.
choice_data_list: But I've always been watching you...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...I'm sure that's because you were watching me
this year.
choice_data_list: But I've always been watching you...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I just really felt it this time...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: It's finally almost time for the Sprinters Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I hope... you keep having eyes for no one but me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems a little calmer and more mature than
usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As this year's summer camp comes to an end, I
can really feel how much she's grown.
